Hello world

Oct 12, 2015
1 minute read

This is the first post of my personal blog and right now im gonna use this space to wirte about the things in curently studing or im interested in.

For now i’m gonna focus on:

  1. Front end development
    • I have a couple years of experience with backbone.js (witch i still really enjoy) but here i’ll propably focus com React.js and all that stuff that the cool kids are playing these days;
    • I’ve been studying and wraping my mind around unit testing and BDD;
    • As a CTO im focusing on user metrics and automated user interaction testing;
    • I nerver liked transpilers and all that stuff but ES6 / ES 2015 is making me rethink all that;
  2. Distributed systems architecture
    • API’s, API design and REST;
    • All the cool stuff around like GraphQL and Relay;
  3. (Last but not least) Patterns and principles
    • Design patterns, data strutures and all the concepts revolving the development world
    • Agile pinciples and methods
    • SCRUM and all it’s quirks
    • Lean methodology

As a side efect i think i will end up learning a lot more by trying to explain the things that i’ll write about and force my self to seek to be a better web developer and person.
